tasks.title: Scaffold TypeScript webhook service
tasks.description: Create the TypeScript service scaffold, HTTP endpoint shell, configuration shape, and test command.
acceptanceCriteria: Service exposes a POST /webhooks/:partner route shell
Configuration includes partner secrets, timestamp tolerance, and retry settings
Tests can run with documented commands
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Scaffold the TypeScript webhook ingestion service from the approved spec. Do not implement verification or delivery behavior yet.

tasks.title: Implement HMAC webhook verification
tasks.description: Implement request timestamp and HMAC SHA-256 signature verification using raw request bodies.
acceptanceCriteria: Missing or invalid signatures are rejected
Valid signatures pass verification with deterministic tests
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Implement the HMAC SHA-256 webhook verification module and tests according to the approved spec.

tasks.title: Normalize accepted webhook events
tasks.description: Parse accepted webhook payloads and map them into the internal normalized event envelope.
acceptanceCriteria: Malformed JSON is rejected with a deterministic error path
Event id, partner, event type, payload, and receivedAt are preserved
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Implement normalized event mapping for accepted webhook requests and add tests for malformed and valid payloads.

tasks.title: Implement queue delivery retry and dead-letter handling
tasks.description: Deliver normalized events through the provider-neutral queue adapter with bounded retry and dead-letter fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: Transient queue failures are retried according to the bounded policy
Exhausted deliveries are written to the dead-letter adapter
Retry and dead-letter behavior is covered with fake adapters
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Implement queue delivery, bounded retry, and dead-letter handling using the approved provider-neutral adapter interfaces.
